description: Style Note Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this sandal from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it and pair it with jeans and casual T-shirts for unparalleled cool. Product Details Open blunt toed dark brown slip on sandals Leather upper which covers the forefoot and midfoot region with cut outs on the side Soft and padded footbed with soft inner lining Upper stitched to the outsole Textured tough rubber outsole with grooves which is slightly upraised at the heel and forefoot region Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain the shine
